scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @tactics-lite/server" "npm run dev -w @tactics-lite/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tactics-lite/game-core && npm run build -w @tactics-lite/server && npm run build -w @tactics-lite/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @tactics-lite/game-core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
